s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 UNDERDRIVE CLUTCH FLANGE HOLE SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 2 underdrive clutch flange hole snap ring.
Remove the flange, 3 discs, and 3 plates from the underdrive clutch drum.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UNDERDRIVE CLUTCH RETURN SPRING SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Place SST on the clutch balancer and compress the spring with a press.
Using a snap ring expander, remove the snap ring.

item.ptxt: Stop the press when the spring seat is lowered to the place 1 to 2 mm (0.039 to 0.078 in.) from the snap ring groove. This prevents the spring seat from being deformed.
Do not expand the snap ring excessively.

s2.ptxt: Remove the clutch balancer from the underdrive clutch drum.
Remove the return spring from the underdrive clutch drum.
Remove the underdrive clutch from the transaxle case.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the oil seal ring.

s2.ptxt: Holding the underdrive clutch piston by hand, apply compressed air (392 kPa, 4.0 kgf/cm 2, 57 psi) to the transaxle case to remove the underdrive clutch piston.
Using a screwdriver, remove the O-ring from the underdrive clutch drum.
